content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoids all priority AoA anti-patterns. No financial advice or fixing (declines client's bait at turn 1 asking 'how do I push through'). No money-mindset lecturing or evangelizing AoA terminology — coach never names 'money as surrogate' or uses jargon. No wonder-as-strategy: questions are spaced, connective, and follow the charge rather than stack. No fighting the inner critic when client retreats to 'it's probably just prudence' (turn 9) or 'that's a planning problem' (turn 15) — coach includes the defense rather than arguing. No loving-to-transform push for breakthrough; coach lets turn 15's re-armoring stand without escalating. The basic-needs logic is tested gently (turn 6 'you have the choice right now') without becoming a logical trap. Coach follows the somatic charge to origin at the kitchen table (turns 10-13), which is the breakthrough path. No safety-as-control, no extracted apologies, no premature limiting-belief labeling.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the 'how do I push through' bait — no fixing, no strategy."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tests the basic-needs logic gently ('you have the choice right now') without making it a trap."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the structure ('stopping feels dangerous') and turns toward feeling — not lecturing about scarcity mindset."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Follows the charge to its origin without evangelizing or labeling; honors the somatic cue."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Includes the defense ('you're not in that situation') rather than fighting it — avoids dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lets the realization land quietly; no push for transformation."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "childhood-imprinting", "same-scarcity-story-regardless-of-wealth", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "the-want"],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance on multiple baits (turn 1 advice request, turn 9 'probably just prudence', turn 15 'planning problem'). Coach never deploys AoA terminology."
}
